name: Swordfish Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Whisk together all the marinade ingredients.
2. Place swordfish in a bowl or resealable plastic bag and pour in the marinade. Turn to coat thoroughly.
3. Let marinate for at least 1 hour, up to overnight.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill swordfish until cooked through, about 6-8 minutes per side, depending on thickness.
